allow: PowerShell(if \($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\) { "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set \(len=$\($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.Length\)\)" } else { "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set in env" })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); btc=next\(c for c in d['coins'] if c['id']=='bitcoin'\); print\(json.dumps\(btc, indent=2\)\)")
